anthropic.name: Anthropic
anthropic.capability: Large‑language‑model provider offering Claude chat and completion models via a REST API.
anthropic.free_tier: No permanent free tier; usage is billed from the first request
anthropic.pricing_note: Pay‑as‑you‑go pricing per token; costs vary by model.

openai.name: OpenAI
openai.capability: Generative AI platform (GPT‑3.5, GPT‑4, GPT‑4o) for chat and completions with embeddings and audio endpoints.
openai.pricing_note: Pay-as-you-go pricing per token. No free tier — credit card required from first use.

xai.name: xAI (Grok)
xai.capability: Large‑language‑model service providing the Grok model via a REST API compatible with OpenAI.
xai.free_tier: Developers may apply for free credits (up to $150/month) via a data‑sharing program; details vary.
xai.pricing_note: Pay‑as‑you‑go pricing per token after free credits.

groq.name: Groq
groq.capability: High‑performance inference service for open‑weight models like Llama 3 using Groq hardware.
groq.free_tier: Free tier provides access to all models with generous rate limits; no credit card is required.
groq.pricing_note: Paid plans increase rate limits and include enterprise support.

mistral.name: Mistral AI
mistral.capability: Foundation model provider offering open‑weight chat and completion models via an API.
mistral.free_tier: Experiment plan with 2 requests per minute and up to 1 billion tokens/month without a credit card.
mistral.pricing_note: Scale plan bills per token and increases rate limits.

cohere.name: Cohere
cohere.capability: LLM and embeddings provider with chat, generation, rerank and embedding endpoints.
cohere.free_tier: Trial API key includes 1,000 API calls per month across all endpoints without a credit card.
cohere.pricing_note: After the free tier, pricing is per token and differs by model.

google-gemini.name: Google Gemini API
google-gemini.capability: Access to Gemini 1.5 Pro and Gemini 1.5 Flash models via the Generative Language API.
google-gemini.free_tier: Free input and output tokens on selected models; limits vary by model and may change.
google-gemini.pricing_note: Standard pricing applies per million input/output tokens once free quota is exceeded.

aws-bedrock.name: AWS Bedrock
aws-bedrock.capability: Aggregator service giving access to models like Claude, Llama and others through a unified API.
aws-bedrock._research_note: AWS uses a key pair (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID + AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY) plus region, not a single API key. Requires IAM setup. More complex than other providers.
aws-bedrock.pricing_note: No permanent free tier; usage is billed per token. New AWS accounts may have promotional credits.

ai21labs.name: AI21 Labs
ai21labs.capability: Provider of Jurassic‑2 and Command models for text generation and embedding tasks.
ai21labs.free_tier: New accounts receive a $10 credit valid for three months; usage draws from this credit.
ai21labs.pricing_note: After the credit, charges accrue per token according to model pricing.

together.name: Together AI
together.capability: Aggregation platform offering open‑weight models (Llama, Mistral, etc.) via an OpenAI‑compatible API.
together.free_tier: Free tier access is available for selected models (e.g., Llama‑3.3 and Mistral 7B) with reduced rate limits.
together.pricing_note: Paid usage is billed per token depending on the model; premium models cost more.

fireworks.name: Fireworks AI
fireworks.capability: Serverless deployment platform for hosted open‑weight models with an OpenAI‑compatible API.
fireworks.free_tier: Free developer tier with a small amount of credits; limits are not publicly specified.
fireworks.pricing_note: After free credits, pricing is per token according to model and compute class.

replicate.name: Replicate
replicate.capability: Hosted model platform for running community models (text and image) with a unified API.
replicate.pricing_note: Charges accrue per second of GPU compute; no free tier.

huggingface.name: Hugging Face Inference API
huggingface.capability: Hosted inference API for thousands of models covering text, vision and audio tasks.
huggingface.free_tier: Generous free tier for community models with unmetered usage up to internal rate limits.
huggingface.pricing_note: Paid plans provide higher rate limits and private model hosting.

perplexity.name: Perplexity AI
perplexity.capability: API providing Perplexity’s search‑enhanced chat models with an OpenAI‑compatible interface.
perplexity.pricing_note: No free tier; usage is billed per token with packages starting at a few dollars.

deepseek.name: DeepSeek
deepseek.capability: Chinese large‑model provider offering DeepSeek‑V3 and DeepSeek‑R1 models via an OpenAI‑compatible API.
deepseek.free_tier: Free tier available — verify current limits on platform.
deepseek.pricing_note: Pay-as-you-go per million tokens. DeepSeek-V3: ~$0.14/M input, $0.28/M output. DeepSeek-R1 higher.
deepseek._research_note: Pricing page notes there is a generous free tier but does not specify limits; the API appears to work globally.
